product.name: AI Scoping Engine
product.description: A 4-agent AI system that transforms meeting transcripts into process maps, findings reports, strategic approaches, clickable prototypes, and client portals. One-click install via Claude Code / Cowork. Replaces 200+ hours of manual discovery/scoping with ~20 hours of AI-assisted extraction and deliverable generation.
product.price: Custom — based on team size and ROI calculation. Not shown on landing page.
product.offer_details: Custom-quoted based on qualification. Funnel: (1) Qualification questions on landing page capture team size, number of PMs, current scoping hours/week, and number of concurrent client engagements. (2) ROI calculator shows prospect their personalised savings (PM hours × rate × weeks = annual waste on manual scoping). (3) Custom quote generated based on their team size and ROI. (4) Book a discovery call to walk through the numbers and close. Selling on ROI to the business — not implementation time or features.
product.guarantee: ROI guarantee — the system pays for itself based on hours saved. Prospect sees their own numbers before the call. Specifics confirmed on discovery call.
usp: 200 hours → 20 hours: 90% reduction in scoping/discovery time
Auto-connects to meeting note-takers (Fathom) — zero manual transcription
Generates clickable prototypes, process maps, and client portals automatically
One-click install via Claude Code / Cowork — no infrastructure to manage
Increases scoping accuracy, reducing downstream development errors and scope creep
Pays for itself in 1-2 weeks for any agency with a full-time PM
4 specialised AI agents: Process Mapper → Process Analyst → Generator → Solution Architect
Direct Fathom.ai integration — auto-pulls meeting transcripts, zero manual upload
MCP-connected CRM — auto-pulls leads, syncs project data, manages pipeline
Interactive demo available — prospects can try before buying
social_proof: {YOUR_COMPANY} has run ~5 live client audits in the last month using this exact system
{YOUR_NAME}'s YouTube channel — hundreds of thousands of views on AI/agency content
Running software agency uses this daily for real client engagements
Testimonials and case studies available from {YOUR_COMPANY} website and audit portal
landing_page_assets: Interactive clickable demo (from order flow prototype)
Video content library from YouTube channel
Social proof from {YOUR_DOMAIN} and client audit portals

audience.icp_description: Founders, technical directors, and project managers at software development agencies and marketing/digital agencies doing $200K+ revenue. Also freelance developers/consultants doing $100K+. Anyone who runs multiple discovery/scoping sessions with clients before building — and feels the pain of that manual, expensive process. They have at least one full-time project manager or senior person spending significant time on pre-build scoping.
pain_points: Discovery/scoping process takes weeks and hundreds of billable hours
Senior technical staff stuck doing manual process documentation instead of building
Scoping inaccuracies lead to scope creep, budget blowouts, and client disputes
Meeting transcripts sit unused — insights lost between sessions
Building proposals and scope documents is repetitive but high-stakes
Can't scale the number of concurrent client engagements due to PM bottleneck
aspirations: Run 3-5x more discovery engagements simultaneously without hiring
Deliver polished client portals and prototypes that close deals faster
Free senior staff from documentation to focus on architecture and delivery
Reduce scoping errors that cause downstream project failures
Systematise their discovery process so it's consistent regardless of who runs it
buying_triggers: Just lost a project due to inaccurate scoping / scope creep
Hiring a new PM and realising the cost vs what AI could do
Growing agency hitting capacity ceiling on concurrent projects
Seeing competitors deliver faster proposals and winning deals
New financial year — budget for tooling and process improvement

key_themes: The upstream bottleneck — AI accelerated coding but scoping is still manual
Agency capacity ceiling — founder/senior PM is the bottleneck on every new engagement
The unpaid scoping problem — agencies scope for free hoping to win the deal
Junior empowerment — want junior PMs to produce senior-quality scopes
Proof hunger — B2B buyers respond to specific numbers, not vague promises
Demo-driven conversion — interactive demos convert best for high-ticket B2B
activation_opportunities: 200 hours → 20 as the anchor hook — specific, provable, novel in this space
Founder-led video creative — Adam's YouTube credibility, competitors not using it
Interactive demo on landing page — no competitor offers try-before-buy
Before/after carousel — manual scoping vs AI output side-by-side
Scope creep pain-agitation hooks — using audience's own language
Social proof stack — YouTube, education community, 5 live audits/month, real portals
ROI calculator as mid-funnel qualification tool

landing_page_copy.headline: Drop Your Scoping Process From Months to Days
landing_page_copy.subheadline: The AI system our agency uses to run 5 client discoveries simultaneously — now available for yours.
benefits: 90% less scoping time — 200 hours of manual discovery compressed to 20 with 4 AI agents working your pipeline
Clickable prototypes, auto-generated — Meeting transcripts become process maps, findings reports, and interactive prototypes
Fathom.ai connected — Auto-pulls your meeting transcripts. Zero manual upload, zero lost insights
Scope accuracy that prevents blowouts — Structured extraction with citation-backed confidence scores
One-click install — Up and running via Claude Code / Cowork in minutes, not weeks
social_proof: Our agency has run 5 client scoping engagements this month using this exact system
Hundreds of thousands of YouTube views on AI + agency content
Interactive demo: try the actual output before you buy

approval_log.notes: Strategy approved: 5 angle themes (200→20, Scope Creep Killer, Junior PM, Founder Bottleneck, Proof Stack), qualification form landing page at scope.{YOUR_DOMAIN}, $50/day budget AU+US+UK
